flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northern New Mexico College fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (10.2% → 6.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northern New Mexico College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northern New Mexico College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (36.4% → 28.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern New Mexico College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8% → 0.0%).
